items.title: Hundreds arrested in France after wild Champions League celebrations
items.summary: Thousands of officers tried to quell unrest as crowds of fans - some firing flares - celebrated PSG's victory over Arsenal.

items.title: US, UK and Australia to develop underwater drone technology
items.summary: The technology, developed under the Aukus military pact, is aimed at protecting undersea cables and boosting naval defence.

items.title: Ebola spread in DR Congo 'deeply alarming', MSF warns
items.summary: The medical charity's comments come as the head of the World Health Organization visits the region worst-hit by the virus outbreak.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 薔蜜颱風撲日 沖繩逾290架起降航班取消

items.title: 阿富汗難民卡車翻覆 至少釀22死36傷
items.summary: 阿富汗拉格曼省連接首都喀布爾和楠格哈爾省的公路，30日有1輛卡車因司機疲勞駕駛翻覆，上面載著從巴基斯坦返回的阿富汗難民，至少造成22死36傷。  據《美聯社》報導，拉格曼省省...…
